zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bruyn於1315年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Maurice Bruyn11312歲，母親Maud Rockley29歲。他於大約1347年與Alice Le Lacer在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1362年2月24日在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Bruyn于1315年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Maurice Bruyn11312岁，母亲Maud Rockley29岁。他于大约1347年与Alice Le Lacer在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1362年2月24日在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bruyn was born in 1315, in England, his father, Sir Maurice Bruyn, was 11312 and his mother, Maud Rockley, was 29. He married Alice Le Lacer about 1347, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 February 1362, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bruyn est né en 1315, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Maurice Bruyn, avait 11312 ans et sa mère, Maud Rockley, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Le Lacer environ 1347, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 février 1362, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Bruyn 1315 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Maurice Bruyn 11312 und seine Mutter Maud Rockley 29. Er hat um 1347 in Essex, England Alice Le Lacer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Februar 1362 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bruyn è nato il nel 1315 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Maurice Bruyn, aveva 11312 anni e il suo madre, Maud Rockley, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice Le Lacer circa 1347, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 febbraio 1362, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Bruynが1315年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice Bruynは11312歳，母Maud Rockleyは29歳であった。約1347年にイギリスエセックスでAlice Le Lacerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1362年2月24日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bruyn(이)가 1315년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Maurice Bruyn(은)는 11312세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Rockley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1347년 영국 에세스에서 Alice Le Lacer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1362년 2월 24일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bruyn nasceu em 1315, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Maurice Bruyn, tinha 11312 anos e sua mãe, Maud Rockley, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Le Lacer aproximadamente 1347, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1362, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bruyn родился в 1315 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Maurice Bruyn было 11312 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Rockley, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Le Lacer около 1347 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 февраля 1362 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Bruyn nació en 1315, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Maurice Bruyn, tenía 11312 años y su mamá, Maud Rockley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice Le Lacer aproximadamente 1347, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1362, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
